issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling and edge case scenarios.

scenarios.name: slack-code-review-setup
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits the required cc-connect.yaml configuration and key steps.

scenarios.name: telegram-daily-report-cron
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric with a complete cc-connect.yaml, cron config, and setup steps, while Response B omits the required YAML, init/start commands, and key details.
